commits.content:
packages:
    common:
      brews:
        - carapace
        - chezmoi
        - direnv
        - docutils
        - eza
        - git
        - fzf
        - lazygit
        - mas
        - mise
        - mods
        - nushell
        - podman
        - ripgrep
        - sevenzip
        - starship
        - wget
      casks:
        - 1password
        - 1password-cli
        - aptakube
        - ghostty
        - gimp
        - google-chrome
        - discord
        - font-fira-code
        - font-fira-code-nerd-font
        - raycast
        - slack
        - visual-studio-code
      vscode:
        # docker
        - ms-azuretools.vscode-docker
        - ms-vscode-remote.remote-containers
        # git
        - eamodio.gitlens
        # gopilot
        - github.copilot
        - github.copilot-chat
        # local file history
        - xpo.local-history
        # lua
        - sumneko.lua
        # markdown
        - bierner.markdown-mermaid
        - davidanson.vscode-markdownlint
        - shd101wyy.markdown-preview-enhanced
        - yzhang.markdown-all-in-one
        # prettier
        - esbenp.prettier-vscode
        # python
        - ms-python.python
        - ms-python.vscode-pylance
        # yaml
        - redhat.vscode-yaml
        # vscode-intellicode
        - visualstudioexptteam.vscodeintellicode
        - visualstudioexptteam.intellicode-api-usage-examples
        - thenuprojectcontributors.vscode-nushell-lang
        # vscode
        - ms-vsliveshare.vsliveshare
    personal:
      brews: []
      casks:
        - visual-studio-code
      vscode:
        # godot
        - geequlim.godot-tools
    work:
      brews:
        # this is here for aptakube
        - kubelogin
        - terraform-docs
      casks:
        - cursor
      vscode:
        # golang
        - golang.go
        # helm
        - tim-koehler.helm-intellisense
        # react
        - dsznajder.es7-react-js-snippets
        # terraform
        - hashicorp.hcl
        - hashicorp.terraform
